title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 109.130 - Reproduced records deemed original, when
text:
109.130.  Reproduced records deemed original, when. — Such reproduction of the original records shall be deemed to be an original record for all purposes provided that the reproduction is equal in resolution to microfilm or electronic process produced pursuant to those standards set forth in subsection 4 of section 109.241, and shall be admissible in evidence in all courts or administrative agencies.  A facsimile, exemplification or certified copy thereof shall, for all purposes recited in sections 109.120 to 109.140, be deemed to be a transcript, exemplification or certified copy of the original.
(L. 1945 p. 1427 § 2, A.L. 1986 S.B. 732, A.L. 1999 S.B. 34)
